3093430.name: TIMELOST - Complete Armory Edition
3093430.description:
Prepare for COMBAT! The Complete Armory Edition unlocks all current and future Weapons, Stimulants, and Upgrade Chips, ensuring you're always battle-ready.

Features:

  • Immediate Access to a FULL Arsenal: Equip formidable weapons like the mighty BattleAxe and the devastating FireStaff. With this edition, master your playstyle by accessing every weapon combination available.

  • Stimulant and Upgrade Chip Unlocks: Enhance your combat strategies with unrestricted access to all stimulants and upgrade chips.

  • DLC Only Player Death FX: Die in style with unique player death visuals

  • Renown Refunds: If you've previously purchased any weapons, stimulants, or upgrade chips with Renown, purchasing this edition will refund their Renown cost.

  • Bonus Renown: Receive an additional 2,500 Renown to personalize your armor and weapon skins, tailoring your appearance to your unique style.

Elevate your TIMELOST gameplay with the Complete Armory Edition and dominate the Arena!
3093430.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
